title: Google Just Revealed What Comes After AGI And It’s Shocking
summary: Google DeepMind released a paper arguing that AGI may be a starting point rather than an endpoint, with the transition to ASI potentially mattering more than AGI itself. The paper suggests that once human-level AI can be copied, sped up, and networked into agent teams to build better AI, intelligence could become an industrializable process.
writeup: The video covers a Google DeepMind paper that frames AGI as a starting point rather than an endpoint, arguing the transition from AGI to ASI may matter more than reaching AGI itself. The core claim: once human-level AI can be copied, accelerated, and networked into agent teams that build better AI, intelligence becomes an industrializable process. The discussion ties this to concepts including AI agents and test-time scaling.
